full_text:
Pei Jun (Fengxian) 裴儁 (奉先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Jun (裴儁), styledFengxian (奉先), was born in Wenxi county, Hedong commandery. Went to Shu for his brother-in-law but remained stuck there due to the chaos in central China. Pei Jun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Pei Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
